explanation: This LTL property states that if the autopilot is in the NOMINAL state and the sensor data is not good (i.e., 'good' is false), then eventually the autopilot will transition to the MANEUVER state.  The property uses the "until" operator (U) to ensure the transition happens before the sensor data becomes good again. It also uses the "next" operator (X) to ensure that the state change happens immediately after the sensor data becomes bad. This captures the intent that the autopilot should react promptly to sensor data faults.
